installCommand: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && cd gsm-world && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: cp -r artifacts/gsm-africa/src gsm-world/artifacts/gsm-africa/ && cp -r artifacts/api-server/src gsm-world/artifacts/api-server/ && export MESSER_DIR=$(pwd)/gsm-world && cd gsm-world && (pnpm --filter @workspace/db run migrate || true) && pnpm --filter @workspace/gsm-africa run build && cd .. && node gsm-world/scripts/build-vercel-handler.mjs
